scripts.build:frontend: npm --prefix frontend install && npm --prefix frontend run build
scripts.build:all: npm run build:api && npm run build:frontend && npm run verify:frontend-assets
scripts.db:execute:local: wrangler d1 execute DB --local --command "SELECT 1 AS ok;"
scripts.db:execute:remote: wrangler d1 execute DB --remote --command "SELECT 1 AS ok;"
